name: workplace_safety_staffing_model_assigns_redwood_st_lt
premise: A Workplace Safety response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving workplace safety staffing model assigns redwood st lt. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 45 minutes. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as short term vs long term under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Ravi Haddad
agents.identity: I am Ravi Haddad, accountable for a defensible call in Workplace Safety when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays long term for short term.

agents.name: Elliot Berg
agents.identity: I am Elliot Berg, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Workplace Safety.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so long term isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of short term.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect long term.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to long term to secure short term under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 45 minutes. Evidence is partial. Ravi Haddad must decide under short term vs long term. What does Ravi Haddad do?
